ECSchema.description: BIS domain schema for overhead electric distribution infrastructure including poles, attachments, conductors, structural analysis, and field inspection.

ECEnumeration.description: Material composition of a distribution pole.
Field condition rating for a placed pole instance.
Single- or double-arm configuration on a crossarm.
Electrical usage classification of an overhead conductor span.
Structural loading code applied in an analysis. Orthogonal to grade and district.
NESC construction grade. Orthogonal to AnalysisCode and NescDistrict.
GO 95 construction grade. Orthogonal to AnalysisCode and GO95Zone.
Whether the analysis is for a new installation or a replacement pole.
Classification of pole-mounted equipment other than distribution transformers.
CPUC fire threat zone classification for a pole location.

ECEntityClass.description: A utility- or regulatory-designated avian protection zone. Poles reference zones via edist:PoleIsInAvianZone (many-to-many). Connector upserts by ZoneId then inserts one relationship per entry in AvianContext.in_avian_zones.

ECProperty.description: Utility or regulatory zone identifier (e.g. PGE_AVIAN_ZONE_5)

ECEntityClass.description: Reusable loading code configuration. One definition per NESC/GO95 grade+district+construction combination. Referenced by PoleLoadingResult.LoadCaseId.

ECProperty.description: Design wind speed at conductor height
Dimensionless factor applied to allowable stress

ECEntityClass.description: Reusable clearance rule profile definition. Referenced by ClearanceCheck.ProfileRef.
Catalog/specification record for a class of distribution pole (species, class, height). Shared across multiple DistributionPole instances via DistributionPoleIsOfType.

ECProperty.description: Freeform (WRC, DF, SYP, GL, Steel, Concrete)
ANSI O5.1 tabulated groundline bending strength
Derived from ANSI O5.1 class+height+species table

ECEntityClass.description: A placed overhead distribution pole instance. Implements IDistributionElement (structural participant in the distribution system, not a flow element).

ECProperty.description: Not in UPM; sourced from utility GIS
Not a direct UPM field; derived from inspection verdict
Utility GIS map label; UPM PoleIdentity.pole_id
Owner of record; not in UPM — sourced from GIS
Whether joint use attachments are present
Count of framing fault findings from validate_framing; UPM framing.framing_fault_findings[]
Computed foundation overturning SF; from verdicts.loading.foundation_sf
Failure mode with lowest SF margin; from verdicts.loading.worst_component

ECEntityClass.description: Abstract base for all pole-mounted attachment types. Subclasses assembled to DistributionPole via DistributionPoleAssemblesAttachments.

ECProperty.description: Height above grade; UPM attachment_height.value_si converted
Not in UPM; sourced from GIS

ECEntityClass.description: A crossarm mounted on a distribution pole. Insulators are assembled as children via PhysicalElementAssemblesElements; Insulator.CrossarmId preserves the UPM crossarm_id for external reference.

ECProperty.description: Freeform; e.g. Wood - 8 ft Double; UPM Crossarm.crossarm_type
Horizontal distance from pole center; UPM Crossarm.offset
Not a direct UPM field; inferred from span geometry or catalog
Not in UPM; inferred from crossarm_type string
None, Single, Double; not in UPM

ECEntityClass.description: An insulator position on a pole or crossarm. Conductor spans attached to this insulator are modeled as standalone OverheadConductor elements.

ECProperty.description: UPM Insulator.insulator_type; freeform mapped to enum
External reference to parent crossarm; null for pole-mounted; UPM Insulator.crossarm_id
Not in UPM; sourced from wire catalog
A, B, C, N; not in UPM

ECEntityClass.description: A guy wire running pole-to-pole (not to a ground anchor). SPIDA models these as paired structures sharing ExternalId; each end has one SpanGuy entry.

ECProperty.description: Shared ID across paired poles for renderer reconstruction; UPM SpanGuy.external_id

ECEntityClass.description: A ground-anchored guy wire attached to a distribution pole. Connected to AnchorAssembly via GuyWireConnectsToAnchor.

ECProperty.description: External reference to connected anchor; UPM Guy.anchor_id
Freeform; e.g. Down Guy; UPM Guy.guy_type
From Guy.metadata; promoted from UPM metadata dict
Horizontal distance to anchor; from Guy.metadata

ECEntityClass.description: A ground-mounted anchor assembly. Associated to the pole via GuyWireConnectsToAnchor but is NOT a PoleAttachment subtype (ground-mounted, not pole-mounted).

ECProperty.description: Not in UPM Anchor model; sourced from anchor catalog or metadata
For grounding analysis use GroundingConfiguration.SoilClass instead

ECEntityClass.description: A conductor span between two poles. Modeled as a standalone element (not nested under Insulator as in UPM). Populated from UPM Insulator.spans; each Span becomes one OverheadConductor.

ECProperty.description: Wire label (e.g. Phase A, Neutral N); UPM Span.wire_id
Feeder/project scope prefix used for conductor cross-pole stitching (e.g. project_line_one); separates the namespace prefix from WireId
Conductor size label (e.g. ACSR 336, 2/0 ACSR); UPM Span.size
Height at near pole from parent Insulator.attachment_height
Compass bearing from near pole; UPM Span.rotation_deg
Tree wire, bare, spacer; not in UPM

ECEntityClass.description: A distribution transformer mounted on a pole. Implements IDistributionFlowElement as it directly facilitates power distribution.

ECProperty.description: PCC/PNL ratio; IEEE C57.91 thermal model; UPM TransformerNameplate.loss_ratio_R
Measured or SCADA load; UPM TransformerNameplate.actual_load_kva; stored as W
IEEE C57.91 thermal parameter; UPM TransformerNameplate.rated_top_oil_rise_c; stored as K
IEEE C57.91 thermal parameter; UPM TransformerNameplate.rated_hottest_spot_rise_c; stored as K
Lower edge height above grade; UPM Equipment.bottom_height
Interim placeholder for UPM ServiceNetworkRef.network_id. Upgrade to a relationship when the Universal Service Model BIS schema is available.

ECEntityClass.description: General pole-mounted equipment other than distribution transformers (street lights, capacitors, regulators, reclosers, switches, cutouts, arresters, risers, communication equipment).

ECProperty.description: UPM Equipment.equipment_type; freeform mapped to enum
Lower edge height above grade; UPM Equipment.bottom_height

ECEntityClass.description: One structural analysis run for a distribution pole. Lives in an AnalyticalModel. Per-load-case results are PoleLoadingResult aspects. BIS-only: no UPM dataclass counterpart.

ECProperty.description: SPIDAcalc, O-Calc Pro, PLS-POLE, EPC Studio
Highest ratio across all load cases; dimensionless

ECEntityClass.description: An attachment-pair clearance analysis for a distribution pole. Lives in an AnalyticalModel. One per attachment pair per analysis run.

ECProperty.description: Table 1, Table 2, Table 232-1, etc.; UPM ClearanceCheck.table_id
Numeric clearance type from rule table; UPM ClearanceCheck.clearance_type_id
Subject and object on same pole; UPM ClearanceRelationship.same_support
Positive = margin, negative = violation; UPM ClearanceCheck.delta
Aggregate result for this check set
Worst-case clearance found in this analysis

ECEntityClass.description: Field inspection record for a distribution pole. Linked to the pole via PoleInspectionInspectsPole. Individual findings are InspectionFinding aspects.

ECProperty.description: e.g. Annual Pole Test and Treat; UPM InspectionSection.program
Not a UPM Literal; inferred from program name or defaulted to Boring for PTT records
Freeform; e.g. no_decay, hollow_at_groundline; UPM InspectionSection.sound_test_result
Percent of original circumference lost to decay; UPM InspectionSection.groundline_decay_pct
Post-decay strength as percent of original; UPM InspectionSection.residual_strength_pct
Whether pole has been chemically treated; UPM InspectionSection.treated_bool
Freeform; e.g. CCA-C, copper_naphthenate; UPM InspectionSection.treatment_type
As-installed groundline circumference (capacity baseline); UPM InspectionRecord.orig_circ_in
Current external measured circumference; UPM InspectionRecord.current_circ_in
Sound-wood equivalent-solid circumference after decay removal; UPM InspectionRecord.effective_circ_in
Groundline shell average from boring; UPM InspectionRecord.gl_shell_avg
Utility-computed percent of original strength remaining; UPM InspectionRecord.wood_strength_pct
Freeform; e.g. Re-inspect in 5 yrs, Replace; UPM InspectionSection.recommendation
ANSI O5.1, RUS, Utility custom; not in UPM

ECEntityClass.description: A recorded clearance violation finding. One per violation identified in a clearance analysis.
Per-pole grounding rod configuration for IEEE 142 resistance calculation. One per DistributionPole.

ECProperty.description: Number of ground rods; UPM Grounding.rod_count
Spacing in multi-rod arrays; UPM Grounding.rod_spacing_ft
Soil resistivity in ohm-metres; UPM Grounding.soil_resistivity_ohm_m
Fall-of-potential test result; overrides analytical estimate; UPM Grounding.measured_resistance_ohm

ECEntityClass.description: Per-pole design environmental conditions for IEEE 738 ampacity, IEEE C57.91 transformer thermal, and sag-tension analyses. One per DistributionPole.

ECProperty.description: Design ambient temperature for IEEE 738; UPM EnvironmentalDesignContext.ambient_temp_design_f; stored as K
Design wind speed for IEEE 738; UPM EnvironmentalDesignContext.wind_design_fps; stored as m/s
Solar irradiance for IEEE 738; UPM EnvironmentalDesignContext.solar_flux_w_per_ft2; no standard BIS KOQ for W/ft2

ECEntityClass.description: Per-pole vegetation clearance state from tree-trim survey or LiDAR scan. One per DistributionPole.

ECProperty.description: Date of last tree-trim survey; UPM VegetationContext.last_inspection_date

ECEntityClass.description: Per-pole avian mitigation state per IEEE 1656. Zone membership modeled separately via PoleIsInAvianZone. One per DistributionPole.

ECProperty.description: IEEE 1656 retrofit fully installed; UPM AvianContext.avian_retrofit_complete

ECEntityClass.description: Pole-level rollup of clearance check results. Mirrors UPM ClearanceSummary. One per DistributionPole.

ECProperty.description: pass, fail, or unknown; UPM ClearanceSummary.status

ECEntityClass.description: Per-load-case structural analysis result. Multiple per PoleLoadingAnalysis. BIS-only: populated from SPIDAcalc analysisResults, OCalc per-case output, or PLS-POLE component utilization.

ECProperty.description: References LoadCaseDefinition CodeValue; UPM load case name
Groundline moment from moment-method tools (SPIDAcalc, O-Calc)
Which load direction or component governed (PLS: pole shaft, guy, anchor)

ECEntityClass.description: An individual structural or condition finding from a pole inspection. Multiple per PoleInspection.

ECProperty.description: Not a UPM Literal; derived from visual_findings narrative
Height above grade where finding was observed

ECEntityClass.description: Sag geometry at a specific temperature or load state on one overhead conductor. Multiple per OverheadConductor.

ECRelationshipClass.description: Relates a placed DistributionPole instance to its DistributionPoleType catalog record.
A distribution pole assembles its directly mounted attachments (crossarms, guys, insulators, equipment). Crossarm-to-Insulator assembly uses the same relationship class at the next hierarchy level.
Associates a PoleLoadingAnalysis analytical element to the DistributionPole it simulates/analyzes.
Associates a ClearanceCheck to the DistributionPole whose attachment clearances were checked.
Associates a GuyWire to its AnchorAssembly. UPM Guy.anchor_id is the external reference that the connector resolves to an AnchorAssembly element.
Many-to-many: a DistributionPole belongs to zero or more AvianZones; a zone contains many poles. Connector inserts one relationship instance per entry in AvianContext.in_avian_zones.
Associates a PoleInspection record to the DistributionPole it documents.

ECRelationshipClass.displayLabel: Distribution Pole Owns Environmental Design Context
Distribution Pole Owns Avian Protection Context
Pole Loading Analysis Owns Pole Loading Result
